description: Analyzes a video for camera cuts and automatically splits it into separate clips based on those scenes.

ffmpeg_logic.step_1: Run the scan_video_scenes tool on the provided video to get the exact timestamps of camera cuts.
ffmpeg_logic.step_2: Calculate the duration of the first 3 scenes using the timestamps. (e.g., Scene 1 is 0 to timestamp_1, Scene 2 is timestamp_1 to timestamp_2).
ffmpeg_logic.step_3: Generate one execute_command that uses ffmpeg to extract these scenes into separate files (e.g., scene_1.mp4, scene_2.mp4, scene_3.mp4). Use the -ss (start time) and -to (end time) flags.
ffmpeg_logic.notes_for_ai: Do not guess timestamps. You MUST rely strictly on the output of scan_video_scenes. If no cuts are found, inform the user.
